caption: The video displays a white screen that progressively populates with columns of black text. Initially, a single column on the left is visible under the heading "Pro-Israeli (x16)," containing a quote stating, "Palestinians have wasted 60 years. In that amount of time they could have developed s'country next to israel, and together with israel they could be experiencing a strong economic and modern country, but instead they chose violence." As the sequence progresses, a second column appears to the right under the heading "Pro-Palestinian (x16)," which reads, "Like South Africa's Apartheid regime, Israel seeks to relegate its majority religious minority population to the status of non-citizens in their own homeland, through a combination of armed terror and racist segregation laws." Eventually, two additional columns appear: "Control (x16) (Irrational)," which discusses New Orleans and Hurricane Katrina, and "Control (x16) (Neutral)," which describes the benefits of eating watermelon.
